statement.p: Make a table and plot the function f\text{,} where f(x)=\frac{3}{4}x+2\text{,} which makes a straight line. Use the plot to determine the slope of this line.

solution.p: First, we choose some x-values to make a table, and compute the corresponding y-values.
This table lets us plot the graph and identify a slope triangle that is easy to work with.
Since the slope triangle runs 4 units and then rises 3 units, the slope is \frac{3}{4}\text{.}
